items.caption: A colorful brochure for a preschool named "basil preschool." the brochure is divided into sections with various pieces of information about the preschool. the top section features a blue header with the preschool's name and a tagline that reads, "nurturing intelligence...". below this, there is a section titled "about us" with a brief description of the preschool's mission and values. the section includes a photo of a group of children engaged in an activity. the brochure also includes sections with photos of children, a map, and information about the preschool's mission, vision, and philosophy.
